src/main/java/org/example/GreetingConfig.general_idea: Simplify the configuration mapping prefix to 'app' and adjust child property names to maintain the same effective configuration keys.
Introduce a new configuration property for default delay with a default value of 200.

src/main/java/org/example/GreetingResour.general_idea: Change the base path of the resource from /hello to /api/ to align with API versioning or structure standards.
Remove OpenTelemetry instrumentation annotations that are no longer used or have been replaced by other mechanisms.
Remove the executeSubprocess method and its invocation, likely due to security concerns or simplification of the demo.

src/main/java/org/example/GreetingResour.general_idea: Add a new endpoint that simulates a delayed response using utility methods for testing latency or timeouts.
Add a new endpoint that accepts a delay parameter to allow dynamic testing of response times.
Add a new endpoint that explicitly throws an exception to test error handling and monitoring.
Add a new endpoint that simulates a delayed error response for testing error handling under latency.
src/main/java/org/example/GreetingResour.human_impl: Added @GET @Path("/error-delayed") method with wait and throw

src/main/java/org/example/GreetingResour.general_idea: Add a server exception mapper to customize the response for BadRequestException, ensuring consistent error reporting.
Inject a new utility class to handle waiting and evaluation logic, separating concerns from the resource class.

src/test/java/org/example/GreetingResour.general_idea: Update the test to hit the new API path that was introduced during the migration.

Upgrade the Quarkus platform BOM from version 3.0.3.Final to 3.13.3 to access features compatible with Java 21.
Replace the deprecated quarkus-resteasy-reactive dependency with the newer quarkus-rest extension.
Update the maven-compiler-plugin version to 3.13.0 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 compilation.
Update the maven-surefire-plugin version to 3.5.0 for modern test execution support.
Increment the project artifact version from 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT to 1.4.0-SNAPSHOT.
